full_text:
Xi Zheng (Lingxian) 郤正 (令先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zheng (郤正), styledLingxian (令先), was born in Yanshi county, Henan commandery. Neither favored nor despised by Huang Hao. Advised Liu Shan in exile, left family behind. Xi Zheng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Xi Zheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
